case_title: OBBIA FORTUNE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORTUNE, OBBIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-16-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-28-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-28-2010 CONTINUED TO JUN-30-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-30-2010 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CIVIL RIGHTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORTUNE, OBBIA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-12-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-11-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-25-2010
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-16-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-28-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-12-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-30-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST OBBIA FORTUNE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-28-2010, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-13-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Continued To Jun-30-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/30/2010 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
